entity.summary: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018 and rebranded as Bithumb Singapore on August 8, 2019.
entity.notes: The 2019-08-08 marker ends the Bitholic brand rather than the underlying Singapore exchange operation. Bithumb Singapore is now canonical, but the predecessor/successor field remains unresolved under the frozen lineage review and is documented through events and notes instead.

expected.summary: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018 that was acquired and rebranded as Bithumb Singapore on 2019-08-08.
expected.notes: Terminal handling uses the 2019-08-08 public inactive/rebrand marker. Death reason is mapped to rebrand because Cryptowisser states that Bitholic was acquired by Bithumb Singapore and was thereafter known as Bithumb Singapore. HEI uses 2018-05-01 as a conservative launch marker from public launch announcements.
